title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Lodha Group

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Lodha Group
jsonLd.description:
Lodha Group has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Rajkot office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Lodha Group:
Lodha Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lodha Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
